title: Apply Knockback Rules
description: Controls how an entity applies knockback to a target

presets.title: Presets
presets.description: Defines how this entity behaves when leashed to another entity. A preset is selected upon leashing and remains until the entity is leashed to something else. The first preset whose "filter" conditions are met will be applied; if none match, a default configuration is used instead.

horizontal_power.title: Horizontal Power
horizontal_power.description: Defines how much the target is hit backwards

vertical_power.title: Vertical Power
vertical_power.description: Defines how much the target is hit upwards

vertical_velocity_cap.title: Vertical Velocity Cap
vertical_velocity_cap.description: Defines the target's maximum vertical upwards velocity after the target's knockback rules have been evaluated

check_if_target_is_immersed_in_water.title: Check If Target Is Immersed In Water
check_if_target_is_immersed_in_water.description: Defines whether the target should be fully immersed in water for the knockback rules to apply

filter.title: Filter
filter.description: Conditions that need to be met for the behavior to start.

scale_previous_velocity.title: Scale Previous Velocity
scale_previous_velocity.description: Scales the previous velocity of the target when hit

horizontal_hit_angle_scale.title: Horizontal Hit Angle Scale
horizontal_hit_angle_scale.description: Scales the horizontal angle response of the target when hit based on the attacker's aim direction

vertical_hit_angle_scale.title: Vertical Hit Angle Scale
vertical_hit_angle_scale.description: Scales the vertical angle response of the target when hit based on the attacker's aim direction

vertical_position_angle_scale.title: Verticla Position Angle Scale
vertical_position_angle_scale.description: Scales the vertical angle response of the target when hit based on the attacker's relative feet position

scale_with_damage.title: Scale With Damage
scale_with_damage.description: Enables scaling the magnitude of knocback based on the inverse square of the damage
